commit.message:
Add storage abstraction files (gitignore was eating src/shared/storage/)

The unanchored \`storage/\` line in .gitignore matched src/shared/storage/
recursively, silently dropping the four backend files from the previous
commit and breaking the build. Anchored to /storage/ + /generated/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
